items.title: Hollander POTD Lou Roe. Undersized PF from UMass was drafted 30th in 95 by DET. Was Calipari's first NBA alum. Roe barely played for DET in 95-96 & then GS in 96-97. Then lasted 15 yrs in the CBA and abroad. Now works back at UMass.
